name: Creme De Cocoa Cake/MW
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Creme de cocoa or water
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except the chocolate syrup in a large bowl.
2. Pour 2/3 of the batter into a greased bundt pan for microwave cooking.
3. Mix the chocolate syrup with the remaining batter.
4. Pour the chocolate syrup mixture over the batter in the pan and do not stir; it should sit on top.
5. Microwave on full power for 10-11 minutes, or until the cake pulls away from the edges of the pan.
6. Remove from the microwave and let stand for 5-10 minutes before turning out onto a cake stand.
7. Place wax paper over the cake while cooling.
Use Creme de menthe instead of creme de cocoa if you prefer.
